Metadata.SourceFile: Chaos in Space (Commdore Disk User - Volume 1 Number 3 - 1988).d64
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x702E "CHAOSINSPACE-1000-702E" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Chaos in Space.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game has a BASIC loading screen which uses a SYS command to start the game when it has finished loading. Therefore the following steps were taken to use this: 1. The POKE147,0 instruction on line 1000 was changed to SYS 4532 ($1100). 2. A new routine was placed at $1000 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers and runs the loading screen program. 3. A new routine was placed at $1100 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game by jumping to $702E.
